text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Creek, you look to be in high spirits. Did anything
fortunate happen to you?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
What do you think happened? I want to hear your
best guess. If you can get it right, I'll give you
something real nice.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...For someone still in training such as myself, I
have nary an inkling of the answer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yet, if your current mood is this jovial, then I am
certain that something truly wonderful must have
transpired.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, the correct answer is your birthday, Yaeno.
You might've gotten it wrong, but I'll still give
you your present. ♪

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Creek, my birthday brings you this much joy?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I have always recognized you as a rival I must
strive to defeat.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I believed that one day, I would harness all my
power... and strike you down with the mind and
body I had honed. That was my view of our
relationship...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And yet, you wish to tell me that such an
opponent's birthday brings you great
contentment?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Of course, silly. ♪ I've prepared plenty of cake
and other treats for you, so be sure to eat a lot so
you can grow big and strong, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...I see, so you would wait for me to grow strong
enough for our inevitable clash. In that case... I
shall gladly accept your generosity!
